headerDisplay: Expose Sonos soundbar Night Mode and Speech Enhancement as HomeKit switches.

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (seconds)
discoveryTimeout.description: How long to wait when auto-discovering Sonos devices on the network.

autoDiscovery.title: Auto-Discovery
autoDiscovery.description: Configure automatic subnet scanning for Sonos devices. Use this when SSDP multicast is unavailable (e.g. You're running Homebridge in a docker container).

subnet.title: Subnet Prefix
subnet.description: The first three octets of your network (e.g. 192.168.1). A TCP scan on port 1400 will be performed across the /24 range.

timeout.title: Scan Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: How long to wait for each host during subnet scanning.

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: Manually specify Sonos soundbar IPs. If provided, auto-discovery is skipped.

name.title: Device Name
name.description: A friendly name for this device.

ip.title: IP Address
ip.description: The IP address of the Sonos soundbar.
